# Fixture for trivy real-binary integration tests.
# Contains deliberately vulnerable package pins that trivy fs / --scanners vuln
# should detect.  Do NOT use these versions in production.
#
# Known CVEs present:
#   requests==2.18.0  — CVE-2018-18074 (HTTP Basic auth leak on redirect)
#   PyYAML==5.3.1     — CVE-2020-14343 (full load arbitrary code exec)
#   Pillow==8.2.0     — CVE-2021-25287 / CVE-2021-25288 (out-of-bounds read)
requests==2.18.0
PyYAML==5.3.1
Pillow==8.2.0
